title: Data Saudi — National Economic Indicators (GDP, Prices, Labor, Markets)
abstract: National quarterly and monthly economic indicators for Saudi Arabia sourced from the Data Saudi open data portal, including nominal/real/seasonally-adjusted GDP by economic activity, wholesale price index, working hours by gender/nationality/sector, and Tadawul stock market indicators. Included for socio-economic context (e.g. agriculture/fishing sector GDP contribution) though most series are not marine- or coastal-specific.

steward.name: General Authority for Statistics (GASTAT), Saudi Arabia

access.how_to_request: Published openly on the Data Saudi portal (https://datasaudi.sa/en), sourced from GASTAT and Tadawul; no request required.

provenance.originator: General Authority for Statistics (GASTAT), Saudi Arabia, via Data Saudi portal

known_issues: National-level macroeconomic indicators, not Red-Sea or coastal-specific; only the Agriculture/Forestry/Fishing sector series are directly relevant to marine socio-economics.

Tadawul stock market indicators are only tangentially related to the Socio-Economic marine domain and are included here mainly for completeness since the file was present in the DataSaudi export folder.
Downloaded as separate export files from the Data Saudi portal (filenames carry export timestamps of 2026-03-23); no formal citation string confirmed, so citation is left null.
